nse.company: Nifty to hit 31,000 by March 2027? OmniScience Capital is overweight on these sectors, but cautious
nse.detail: Sensex and Nifty have overall begun the new financial year 2027 on a positive note, recovering some of the losses which were recorded during the sharp downturns of March.

nse.company: Midcap Meltdown: 12 stocks slide up to 50% from 52-week highs, FIIs cut stakes
nse.detail: Midcap stocks have seen sharp corrections despite index resilience, with most of the worst performers witnessing FII stake cuts, signalling cautious sentiment in the segment.

nse.company: Tech Mahindra declares Rs 36/share final dividend; sets July 3 as record date

nse.company: Infosys Q4 Preview: Can strong earnings offset concerns around AI?
nse.detail: Infosys anticipates a subdued March quarter, with revenue growth slowing due to seasonal factors, though full-year targets remain achievable. Investors are keenly awaiting FY27 guidance and insights into AI's impact and discretionary spending trends

nse.company: Rs 92,000 crore ripple effect! HCL Tech’s weak Q4 drags IT pack; Infosys, Tech Mahindra slump up to
nse.detail: HCL Technologies’s weak Q4 triggered a ₹92,000 crore sell-off in IT stocks, dragging peers like Infosys and Tech Mahindra down up to 6% amid sector-wide concerns.

nse.company: Morgan Stanley reiterates ‘Overweight’ rating on TCS, sees 10% upside potential

nse.company: HCL Tech shares wipe out Rs 38,000 crore as target price falls to Rs 1,165. Why every second broker
nse.detail: HCL Technologies share price plummeted nearly 10%, wiping out Rs 38,000 crore in market cap following a brutal Q4 earnings report. The IT major missed revenue, margin, and guidance targets, triggering widespread broker downgrades and price target cut

nse.detail: Websol Energy Systems shares surged after investor Vijay Kedia emerged in its latest shareholding data with over 1% stake. The development boosted sentiment, driving strong short-term gains. The company also plans to consider a dividend, while long-t

nse.company: Smallcap stock Rolex Rings share price rockets 26% in two days ahead of board meet to consider buyba
nse.detail: Rolex Rings shares surged nearly 9% as the company's board is set to consider its first-ever share buyback on April 23. The stock has seen a significant 35% rise in just six sessions, fueled by the buyback announcement and strong Q3 financial results

nse.company: Tata Power vs Adani Power: As temperatures soar, which stock will shine?
nse.detail: Shares of Tata Power and Adani Power surged as heatwave alerts from the India Meteorological Department raised expectations of higher electricity demand, with analysts weighing their risk-reward appeal.

nse.company: BEML shares rally 8% after Rs 590 crore defence order win
